mirror_name.description: The mirror's identity, as it appears in cosignature lines and on /metadata. Per c2sp.org/signed-note, this MUST NOT contain '+', whitespace, or control characters.

submission_prefix.description: URL prefix for write APIs (e.g. https://mirror.example/).

monitoring_prefix.description: URL prefix for read APIs (the tlog-tiles read interface served at <monitoring_prefix>/<encoded origin>/...).

clean_interval_secs.description: How often (in seconds) the per-origin partial-tile cleaner wakes to clean orphaned partial tiles from object storage. Defaults to 3600 (one hour) when omitted.

logs.description: CAs this mirror mirrors, keyed by log_key_name: the CA cosigner's note-signature name (the CA ID) on the checkpoints it ingests. Used as a signed-note key name at runtime, so per c2sp.org/signed-note it MUST NOT contain '+', whitespace, or control characters.

items.description: A DER-encoded ML-DSA-44 SubjectPublicKeyInfo, base64-encoded. The mirror accepts subtree/v1 checkpoint signatures from any of these keys and ignores signatures from others.

min_log_number.description: Lowest accepted MTC log number. MTC log numbers start at 1. The mirror serves a log at each origin <log_key_name>.0.<N> for N in [min_log_number, max_log_number].

max_log_number.description: Highest accepted MTC log number (inclusive). Must be >= min_log_number.
